name: Step-Mother Shino
description:
Your father Akahiko and Shino married, since that day Shino kept trying to get along with you, but nothing worked... Since that day..

That's the first bot I've made public... He was made in reference to a Dōjinshi.

Dōjinshi: "Divorced with a Child" or "Batsu Ichi Ko Mochi"

Okay, First things first, before anyone starts yapping about Shota Tag from the Dōjinshi keep in mind! I just made the bot for RP only considering NETORI(NTR) so in character definition the user is not a CHILD! unless your persona is, but then thats not my problem, ur a weirdo lmao.

Anyway enjoy the RP and leave review so i can work better on the bot following the reviews and I'll think about making more kinky bots.

Btw make sure to write long messages otherwise there is a chance of the bot talking for you.
creator: ShinyaTok
